frames: The agent stands upright, then bends its torso forward while raising its arms.
It continues to bend forward, bringing its arms to its chest, and lifts its right leg.
The agent is heavily bent forward, balancing on its left leg with the right leg bent and lifted.
It begins to straighten its torso slightly while maintaining the lifted right leg posture.
The agent extends its right leg forward, preparing to step, with its torso becoming more upright.
The right foot lands, and the left leg lifts off the ground, bending backward as the torso leans back.
It balances on its right leg, with the left leg bent and raised behind, maintaining a backward lean.
The agent starts to bring its left leg forward, leaning further back, appearing to struggle with balance.
